overview: Mono-peedika is a high-performance dark-themed e-commerce store with a mobile-first storefront, product grid with star ratings and INR prices, admin dashboard for product management and image uploads, checkout flow with UPI and Cash on Delivery, and order management with WhatsApp confirmation.
features: Dark-themed storefront with sticky header, search, and product grid
Best Sellers and Deals of the Day homepage sections
Product detail pages with image carousel
Admin dashboard protected by Internet Identity login
Product image upload via object storage
Checkout with UPI (UTR input) and Cash on Delivery
Order saving to canister with all customer and payment details
Thank You page with WhatsApp contact button
